evidence: Methods section: "Permutation variable importance mode was used." The paper ranks variables by importance and makes conclusions based on percentile rankings: "rs9661059 in chromosome 1, was impressively ranked as the single top predictor" and "RF was able to identify causal CpG sites cg00000363 and cg10480950 (each ranked >97th percentile)". Table 1 validates rankings against linear regression on known causal variables, showing correlation between importance ranks and true effects from regression models.
